title: cirsium × kozlovskyi
intro: Cirsium × kozlovskyi, also known as Kozlovsky's thistle, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Cirsium × kozlovskyi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and ulcers. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
